body:
## What's Changed
* Bump tar from 7.5.9 to 7.5.10 by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/actions/attest/pull/371
* Bump tar from 7.5.10 to 7.5.11 by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/actions/attest/pull/375
* Bump the npm-production group across 1 directory with 2 updates by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/actions/attest/pull/404
* Bump minimatch by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/actions/attest/pull/399
* Bump brace-expansion from 1.1.12 to 1.1.14 by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/actions/attest/pull/397
* Bump undici from 6.23.0 to 6.24.1 by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/actions/attest/pull/381
* Bump ip-address from 10.1.0 to 10.2.0 by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/actions/attest/pull/411
* Bump undici from 7.25.0 to 8.2.0 by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/actions/attest/pull/409
* Bump tar from 7.5.11 to 7.5.17 by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/actions/attest/pull/429
* Bump csv-parse from 5.6.0 to 6.2.1 by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/actions/attest/pull/414
* Bump @sigstore/oci from 0.6.1 to 0.7.1 by @bdehamer in https://github.com/actions/attest/pull/432

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/actions/attest/compare/v4.1.0...v4.1.1
